metadata.name: raw_futebol_fixture_events
metadata.comment: API-Football /fixtures/events, NDJSON. N linhas por fixture (1 por evento: gol/cartão/subst/VAR), 1 arquivo por fixture_id. event_order carimba a ordem cronológica (a API não traz id/ordem). team/player/assist aninhados — achatados em stg_futebol_fixture_events. Só jogos finalizados (FT/AET/PEN).

team.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, logo STRING>
team.name: team

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: raw_futebol_fixture_lineups
metadata.comment: API-Football /fixtures/lineups, NDJSON. 2 linhas por (fixture, fase) (mandante e visitante), 1 arquivo por (fixture_id, fase). Wildcard cobre _confirmed (pré-jogo ~T-30min) + _real (pós-jogo). team/coach + startXI/substitutes aninhados — flatten/UNNEST em stg_futebol_fixture_lineups(_players). lineup_phase = 'confirmed'|'real'; fato é latest-wins (dedup por loaded_at).

team.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, logo STRING>
team.name: team

coach.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, photo STRING>
coach.name: coach

startXI.type: ARRAY<STRUCT<player STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, number INT64, pos STRING, grid STRING>>>
startXI.name: startXI

startXI.player.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, number INT64, pos STRING, grid STRING>
startXI.player.name: startXI.player

substitutes.type: ARRAY<STRUCT<player STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, number INT64, pos STRING, grid STRING>>>
substitutes.name: substitutes

substitutes.player.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, number INT64, pos STRING, grid STRING>
substitutes.player.name: substitutes.player

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: raw_futebol_fixture_player_stats
metadata.comment: API-Football /fixtures/players, NDJSON. N linhas por fixture (1 por jogador que entrou em campo, ambos os times; ~22-30/jogo), 1 arquivo por fixture_id. team/player + statistics aninhados (statistics é struct único — flatten em stg_futebol_fixture_player_stats). Schema explícito (campos null-heavy + rating/accuracy string; penalty.commited com grafia errada da API). Só jogos finalizados (FT/AET/PEN).

team.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, logo STRING>
team.name: team

player.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, photo STRING>
player.name: player

statistics.type: STRUCT<games STRUCT<minutes INT64, number INT64, position STRING, rating STRING, captain BOOL, substitute BOOL>, offsides INT64, shots STRUCT<total INT64, `on` INT64>, goals STRUCT<total INT64, conceded INT64, assists INT64, saves INT64>, passes STRUCT<total INT64, key INT64, accuracy STRING>, tackles STRUCT<total INT64, blocks INT64, interceptions INT64>, duels STRUCT<total INT64, won INT64>, dribbles STRUCT<attempts INT64, success INT64, past INT64>, fouls STRUCT<drawn INT64, committed INT64>, cards STRUCT<yellow INT64, red INT64>, penalty STRUCT<won INT64, commited INT64, scored INT64, missed INT64, saved INT64>>
statistics.name: statistics

statistics.dribbles.type: STRUCT<attempts INT64, success INT64, past INT64>
statistics.dribbles.name: statistics.dribbles

statistics.games.type: STRUCT<minutes INT64, number INT64, position STRING, rating STRING, captain BOOL, substitute BOOL>
statistics.games.name: statistics.games

statistics.goals.type: STRUCT<total INT64, conceded INT64, assists INT64, saves INT64>
statistics.goals.name: statistics.goals

statistics.passes.type: STRUCT<total INT64, key INT64, accuracy STRING>
statistics.passes.name: statistics.passes

statistics.penalty.type: STRUCT<won INT64, commited INT64, scored INT64, missed INT64, saved INT64>
statistics.penalty.name: statistics.penalty

statistics.tackles.type: STRUCT<total INT64, blocks INT64, interceptions INT64>
statistics.tackles.name: statistics.tackles

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: raw_futebol_fixture_statistics
metadata.comment: API-Football /fixtures/statistics, NDJSON. 2 linhas por fixture (mandante e visitante), 1 arquivo por fixture_id. statistics fica como array aninhado [{type STRING, value STRING}] (value stringificado; schema explícito p/ não virar FLOAT) — pivot em stg_futebol_fixture_statistics. Só jogos finalizados (FT/AET/PEN).

team.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, logo STRING>
team.name: team

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: raw_futebol_fixtures
metadata.comment: API-Football /fixtures, NDJSON. 1 linha por fixture (jogo) requisitada. Espinha do pipeline — fixture_id destrava stats/events/lineups/player_stats. Arquivos: raw_futebol_fixtures_current.json (ano corrente, diário) + raw_futebol_fixtures_backfill.json (anos anteriores, one-shot).

score.type: STRUCT<extratime STRUCT<away STRING, home STRING>, fulltime STRUCT<away INT64, home INT64>, penalty STRUCT<away STRING, home STRING>, halftime STRUCT<away INT64, home INT64>>
score.name: score

fixture.type: STRUCT<venue STRUCT<city STRING, name STRING, id INT64>, periods STRUCT<second INT64, first INT64>, timestamp INT64, timezone STRING, status STRUCT<extra INT64, short STRING, elapsed INT64, long STRING>, date TIMESTAMP, referee STRING, id INT64>
fixture.name: fixture

fixture.status.type: STRUCT<extra INT64, short STRING, elapsed INT64, long STRING>
fixture.status.name: fixture.status

fixture.venue.type: STRUCT<city STRING, name STRING, id INT64>
fixture.venue.name: fixture.venue

teams.type: STRUCT<away STRUCT<winner BOOL, logo STRING, name STRING, id INT64>, home STRUCT<winner BOOL, logo STRING, name STRING, id INT64>>
teams.name: teams

teams.away.type: STRUCT<winner BOOL, logo STRING, name STRING, id INT64>
teams.away.name: teams.away

teams.home.type: STRUCT<winner BOOL, logo STRING, name STRING, id INT64>
teams.home.name: teams.home

league.type: STRUCT<season INT64, round STRING, flag STRING, standings BOOL, logo STRING, country STRING, name STRING, id INT64>
league.name: league

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: raw_futebol_injuries
metadata.comment: API-Football /injuries, NDJSON. Snapshot diário de lesionados/suspensos: N linhas por (liga, season, snapshot_date) — 1 por (player, fixture, type, reason); a API repete linhas exatas (dedup no fato). 1 arquivo por dia+mode (date-stampado, acumula histórico; re-run no mesmo dia sobrescreve = idempotente): _current_{data}.json (Brasileirão 2026, diário) + _backfill_{data}.json (Brasileirão 2024/2025, one-shot). snapshot_date = data da coleta (partição no fato). type ∈ {Missing Fixture, Questionable}; reason é texto livre (inclui suspensões). Schema explícito (type/reason STRING aninhados em player; fixture.date ISO→TIMESTAMP). ⚠️ Só Brasileirão tem coverage.injuries=TRUE (Copa do Mundo fora — coverage FALSE).

player.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, photo STRING, type STRING, reason STRING>
player.name: player

team.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, logo STRING>
team.name: team

fixture.type: STRUCT<id INT64, timezone STRING, date TIMESTAMP, timestamp INT64>
fixture.name: fixture

league.type: STRUCT<id INT64, season INT64, name STRING, country STRING, logo STRING, flag STRING>
league.name: league

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: raw_futebol_leagues
metadata.comment: API-Football /leagues, NDJSON. 1 linha por (league_id, season) requisitada. Arquivos: raw_futebol_leagues_current.json (ano corrente, diário) + raw_futebol_leagues_backfill.json (anos anteriores, one-shot).

seasons.type: ARRAY<STRUCT<coverage STRUCT<predictions BOOL, top_assists BOOL, injuries BOOL, top_scorers BOOL, top_cards BOOL, players BOOL, odds BOOL, standings BOOL, fixtures STRUCT<statistics_players BOOL, lineups BOOL, statistics_fixtures BOOL, events BOOL>>, `end` DATE, `current` BOOL, start DATE, year INT64>>
seasons.name: seasons

seasons.coverage.type: STRUCT<predictions BOOL, top_assists BOOL, injuries BOOL, top_scorers BOOL, top_cards BOOL, players BOOL, odds BOOL, standings BOOL, fixtures STRUCT<statistics_players BOOL, lineups BOOL, statistics_fixtures BOOL, events BOOL>>
seasons.coverage.name: seasons.coverage

seasons.coverage.fixtures.type: STRUCT<statistics_players BOOL, lineups BOOL, statistics_fixtures BOOL, events BOOL>
seasons.coverage.fixtures.name: seasons.coverage.fixtures

country.type: STRUCT<flag STRING, code STRING, name STRING>
country.name: country

league.type: STRUCT<logo STRING, type STRING, name STRING, id INT64>
league.name: league

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: raw_futebol_odds
metadata.comment: API-Football /odds, NDJSON. Snapshot pré-jogo de odds (CLV/EV/value betting), FORWARD-ONLY, em 2 janelas por jogo (collection_window t24h = linha de abertura, t1h = perto do fechamento). N linhas por (fixture, janela) — 1 por CASA; bets/values aninhados (REPEATED). 1 arquivo por (fixture, janela): raw_futebol_odds_{fixture}_{t24h|t1h}.json (skip-if-exists = 1 snapshot/janela). Guarda TODAS as casas/mercados; o fact afunila p/ os 8 mercados-alvo. Schema explícito (odd/value STRING — cast no stg; collection_timestamp/api_update ISO→TIMESTAMP; kickoff_timestamp unix INTEGER). Brasileirão (71) + Copa do Mundo (1) 2026 (ambos coverage.odds=TRUE).

bets.type: ARRAY<STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, values ARRAY<STRUCT<value STRING, odd STRING>>>>
bets.name: bets

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: raw_futebol_players
metadata.comment: API-Football /players, NDJSON. 1 linha por (player, league, season) requisitada. Mesmo jogador pode aparecer em múltiplas (liga, temporada) — dedup em dim_players. Arquivos: raw_futebol_players_current.json (ano corrente, diário) + raw_futebol_players_backfill.json (anos anteriores, one-shot).

statistics.type: ARRAY<STRUCT<penalty STRUCT<missed INT64, scored INT64, commited INT64, saved INT64, won INT64>, cards STRUCT<yellowred INT64, red INT64, yellow INT64>, dribbles STRUCT<past STRING, success INT64, attempts INT64>, tackles STRUCT<interceptions INT64, blocks INT64, total INT64>, passes STRUCT<key INT64, accuracy INT64, total INT64>, substitutes STRUCT<bench INT64, out INT64, `in` INT64>, fouls STRUCT<committed INT64, drawn INT64>, games STRUCT<captain BOOL, rating FLOAT64, number INT64, minutes INT64, appearences INT64, lineups INT64, position STRING>, duels STRUCT<won INT64, total INT64>, goals STRUCT<saves INT64, assists INT64, conceded INT64, total INT64>, league STRUCT<season INT64, flag STRING, logo STRING, country STRING, name STRING, id INT64>, shots STRUCT<`on` INT64, total INT64>, team STRUCT<logo STRING, name STRING, id INT64>>>
statistics.name: statistics

statistics.cards.type: STRUCT<yellowred INT64, red INT64, yellow INT64>
statistics.cards.name: statistics.cards

statistics.goals.name: statistics.goals

statistics.league.name: statistics.league

statistics.passes.name: statistics.passes

statistics.penalty.name: statistics.penalty

statistics.tackles.name: statistics.tackles

statistics.team.type: STRUCT<logo STRING, name STRING, id INT64>
statistics.team.name: statistics.team

player.type: STRUCT<injured BOOL, weight STRING, birth STRUCT<country STRING, place STRING, date DATE>, age INT64, photo STRING, lastname STRING, nationality STRING, firstname STRING, name STRING, height STRING, id INT64>
player.name: player

player.birth.type: STRUCT<country STRING, place STRING, date DATE>
player.birth.name: player.birth

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: raw_futebol_predictions
metadata.comment: API-Football /predictions, NDJSON. Previsão pré-jogo do algoritmo da própria API (BASELINE de comparação p/ modelo próprio). FORWARD-ONLY, 1 janela (T-2h), 1 LINHA por fixture: raw_futebol_predictions_{fixture}.json (skip-if-exists = 1 captura/jogo). predictions (winner/win_or_draw/under_over/goals/advice/percent) e comparison (form/att/def/poisson_distribution/h2h/goals/total) ANINHADOS — flatten por dot-access em stg_futebol_predictions (sem UNNEST). Schema explícito (percentuais '45%' e linhas de gol '-1.5' STRING — cast no stg; collection_timestamp ISO→TIMESTAMP; kickoff_timestamp unix INTEGER). Brasileirão (71) + Copa do Mundo (1) 2026 (ambos coverage.predictions=TRUE).

predictions.type: STRUCT<winner STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, comment STRING>, win_or_draw BOOL, under_over STRING, goals STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING>, advice STRING, percent STRUCT<home STRING, draw STRING, away STRING>>
predictions.name: predictions

predictions.percent.type: STRUCT<home STRING, draw STRING, away STRING>
predictions.percent.name: predictions.percent

predictions.winner.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, comment STRING>
predictions.winner.name: predictions.winner

comparison.type: STRUCT<form STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING>, att STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING>, def STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING>, poisson_distribution STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING>, h2h STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING>, goals STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING>, total STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING>>
comparison.name: comparison

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: raw_futebol_standings
metadata.comment: API-Football /standings, NDJSON. Snapshot diário da tabela do campeonato: N linhas por (liga, season, snapshot_date) — 1 por time×grupo (na Copa o time aparece no grupo e no 'Ranking of third-placed teams'). 1 arquivo por dia+mode (date-stampado, acumula histórico; re-run no mesmo dia sobrescreve = idempotente): _current_{data}.json (Brasileirão 2026 + Copa 2026, diário) + _backfill_{data}.json (tabela FINAL Brasileirão 2024/2025, one-shot). snapshot_date = data da coleta (partição no fato); `update` = última atualização da tabela na API. Grupos da Copa achatados (coluna group). Schema explícito (all/group/goals.for são keywords SQL — crases no stg).

team.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, logo STRING>
team.name: team

all.type: STRUCT<played INT64, win INT64, draw INT64, lose INT64, goals STRUCT<`for` INT64, against INT64>>
all.name: all

home.type: STRUCT<played INT64, win INT64, draw INT64, lose INT64, goals STRUCT<`for` INT64, against INT64>>
home.name: home

away.type: STRUCT<played INT64, win INT64, draw INT64, lose INT64, goals STRUCT<`for` INT64, against INT64>>
away.name: away

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: raw_futebol_team_season_stats
metadata.comment: API-Football /teams/statistics, NDJSON. 1 linha por (time, liga, season), 1 arquivo por mode (latest-only): raw_futebol_team_season_stats_current.json (Brasileirão 2026 + Copa 2026, semanal) + _backfill.json (Brasileirão 2024/2025, one-shot). Objeto único da API curado em forma aninhada (fixtures/goals/clean_sheet/failed_to_score/biggest/penalty; buckets por minuto/under_over/cards/lineups descartados) — achatado em stg_futebol_team_season_stats. snapshot_date = data da coleta (chave de partição). Schema explícito (averages/percentage STRING).

team.type: STRUCT<id INT64, name STRING, logo STRING>
team.name: team

fixtures.type: STRUCT<played STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>, wins STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>, draws STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>, loses STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>>
fixtures.name: fixtures

fixtures.draws.type: STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>
fixtures.draws.name: fixtures.draws

fixtures.loses.type: STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>
fixtures.loses.name: fixtures.loses

fixtures.played.type: STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>
fixtures.played.name: fixtures.played

fixtures.wins.type: STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>
fixtures.wins.name: fixtures.wins

goals.type: STRUCT<`for` STRUCT<total STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>, average STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING, total STRING>>, against STRUCT<total STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>, average STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING, total STRING>>>
goals.name: goals

goals.against.type: STRUCT<total STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>, average STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING, total STRING>>
goals.against.name: goals.against

goals.against.average.type: STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING, total STRING>
goals.against.average.name: goals.against.average

goals.against.total.type: STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>
goals.against.total.name: goals.against.total

goals.for.type: STRUCT<total STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>, average STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING, total STRING>>
goals.for.name: goals.for

goals.for.average.type: STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING, total STRING>
goals.for.average.name: goals.for.average

goals.for.total.type: STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>
goals.for.total.name: goals.for.total

clean_sheet.type: STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>
clean_sheet.name: clean_sheet

failed_to_score.type: STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64, total INT64>
failed_to_score.name: failed_to_score

biggest.type: STRUCT<streak STRUCT<wins INT64, draws INT64, loses INT64>, wins STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING>, loses STRUCT<home STRING, away STRING>, goals STRUCT<`for` STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64>, against STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64>>>
biggest.name: biggest

biggest.goals.type: STRUCT<`for` STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64>, against STRUCT<home INT64, away INT64>>
biggest.goals.name: biggest.goals

biggest.streak.type: STRUCT<wins INT64, draws INT64, loses INT64>
biggest.streak.name: biggest.streak

penalty.type: STRUCT<scored STRUCT<total INT64, percentage STRING>, missed STRUCT<total INT64, percentage STRING>, total INT64>
penalty.name: penalty

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: raw_futebol_teams
metadata.comment: API-Football /teams, NDJSON. 1 linha por (team, league, season) requisitada. Arquivos: raw_futebol_teams_current.json (ano corrente, diário) + raw_futebol_teams_backfill.json (anos anteriores, one-shot).

venue.type: STRUCT<image STRING, surface STRING, capacity INT64, address STRING, id INT64, city STRING, name STRING>
venue.name: venue

team.type: STRUCT<logo STRING, founded INT64, country STRING, code STRING, name STRING, national BOOL, id INT64>
team.name: team

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table
